Mai Hanh Nguyen

Research Assistant

Financial Technology and Digital Business

About Me

Nguyen Thi Mai Hanh (born in 2005) is currently an undergraduate student majoring in Financial Technology and Digital Business at the VNU International School, Vietnam National University, Hanoi (VNU-IS).She has a strong passion for technology, computer science, and modern finance. Her research interests focus on Computer Vision and the application of artificial intelligence in data analysis and real-world problem solving.

Education

  • B.Sc. in Financial Technology & Digital Business
    VNU International School, Vietnam National University, Hanoi, 2028
